summary: Comprehensive testing of Grocery Admin and Laundry Admin modules. All pages load correctly, RBAC works (Super Admin denied access). Most CRUD operations work. Found critical bugs in Laundry Pricing and Time Slots creation (missing store_id).

critical.issue: Returns 422 - store_id is required but frontend doesn't send it
Returns 422 - store_id is required but frontend doesn't send it. Also days_of_week expects List[int] but frontend sends strings

minor.issue: store_id is required - works in UI because category has store_id, but API test without store_id fails

ui_bugs.issue: Missing store_id field - form doesn't include store_id which is required by backend
Missing store_id field and days_of_week sends strings instead of integers
When backend returns validation error (array of objects), toast tries to render object directly causing React error: 'Objects are not valid as a React child'

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility issue

action_items: FIX (HIGH): Add store_id to Laundry Pricing form - fetch stores and auto-select or let user choose
FIX (HIGH): Add store_id to Laundry TimeSlots form and change days_of_week to send integers [0,1,2,3,4,5,6] instead of strings
FIX (MEDIUM): Improve error handling in toast - when detail is an array, extract message properly: typeof detail === 'string' ? detail : detail[0]?.msg || 'Operation failed'
FIX (LOW): Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: Laundry Pricing.js line 21-27: pricingForm missing store_id field
Laundry TimeSlots.js line 17-23: slotForm missing store_id and days_of_week should be integers
All forms: error.response?.data?.detail can be array of objects, not just string - needs proper handling

success_rate.backend: 84% (26/31 tests passed, 5 failed due to missing store_id)
success_rate.frontend: 85% - All pages load, most CRUD works, Pricing and TimeSlots creation fails

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Fruits_UI category, TEST_Apple_UI product, TEST_Wash_UI service, TEST_Shirt_UI item during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grocery Admin and Laundry Admin modules are mostly functional. RBAC works correctly. Main issues are: 1) Laundry Pricing creation fails (missing store_id), 2) Laundry TimeSlots creation fails (missing store_id + wrong days_of_week format), 3) Error handling in toasts needs improvement. All navigation and page loading works. Categories, Products, Services, Items CRUD all work.

crud_operations.laundry_timeslot_create: FAIL - 422 missing store_id + wrong days_of_week format
